transcript:
CALLER: Hi, uh, I need to reschedule my appointment. I have one this Friday but I have a work conflict.
AGENT: No problem at all. Can I get your name and which doctor the appointment is with?
CALLER: Ananya Rao, and it's with Dr. Priti Joshi.
AGENT: Found it — Friday 12 PM with Dr. Joshi. What dates or times would work better for you?
CALLER: Anytime next week, preferably morning. Monday or Tuesday maybe?
AGENT: Dr. Joshi has a slot on Tuesday at 9:30 AM. Shall I move your appointment there?
CALLER: Yes, perfect!
AGENT: Done! Your appointment has been rescheduled to Tuesday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Joshi. You'll get a confirmation SMS. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No, that's it. Thank you.
AGENT: You're welcome, Ms. Rao. See you Tuesday!
